zh.lifeSummary: 當William Greville於大約1337年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，他的父親William Greville23歲，母親Anna Neuville18歲。他於1370年之前與Marion Thornborough結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1401年10月1日在英國格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登。

nameMeanings.name: Greville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Gréville (Manche), common in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Greville was born about 1337, in London, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Greville, was 23 and his mother, Anna Neuville, was 18. He married Marion Thornborough before 1370. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 October 1401, in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Greville est né environ 1337, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Greville, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Anna Neuville, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Marion Thornborough avant 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 octobre 1401, à Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Marion Thornborough prima del 1370. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Grevilleが約1337年にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父William Grevilleは23歳，母Anna Neuvilleは18歳であった。1370年以前にMarion Thornboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1401年10月1日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング カンプデンで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング カンプデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Greville(이)가 대략 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Greville(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Neuville(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1370년 이전 Marion Thornborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1401년 10월 1일 영국 그루스스터실르 치핀그 캠p든에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 치핀그 캠p든에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Marion Thornborough antes 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1401, em Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Greville родился около 1337 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Greville было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Neuville, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Thornborough перед 1370 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 октября 1401 г. в местности чиппинг кампден, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности чиппинг кампден, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
